headline: A Look At Seagate Technology (STX) Valuation After Strong AI Driven Earnings And HAMR Storage Momentum
summary: What Seagate’s latest earnings reveal about the AI storage story Seagate Technology Holdings (STX) just reported third quarter results that put a spotlight on how AI and data center demand are feeding into the business and, by extension, the stock. For the quarter ended April 3, 2026, Seagate reported sales of US$3,112 million compared with US$2,160 million a year earlier, and net income of US$748 million compared with US$340 million.
